title: Trip History: Show Other Pending Amounts with Edit/Delete

requirements.text: Add an 'otherPendingAmounts' array to the ledger state data model. Each entry must have: id (unique string), traveller name (string), date (string), amount (number), and comment (optional string). Ensure CRUD operations (add, edit, delete) are available and that existing 'Other Pending Amount' entries from the Summary/SummaryPanel flow map to this same data structure.

quotes: reflects and can be adjust everywhere where applicable

acceptanceCriteria: otherPendingAmounts entries persist in localStorage and sync to the backend
Adding an entry from the Summary page stores it in this shared data model
Editing or deleting an entry from any page updates the single shared source of truth
Each entry has: id, name, date, amount, comment fields

requirements.text: On the Trip History page (TripHistoryPanel), display a flat list of all Other Pending Amounts for the selected date range. Each row must show: Name, Date, Amount, and Comment. Each row must have an Edit button and a Delete button.

quotes: Trip History page to also display Other Pending Amount

acceptanceCriteria: Trip History page has a clearly labeled section (e.g. 'Other Pending Amounts') showing a flat list
Each row displays Name, Date, Amount, and Comment
Each row has an Edit action and a Delete action
The list is filtered by the currently selected date range

requirements.text: Implement an Edit dialog for Other Pending Amount entries accessible from the Trip History page. The form must allow editing Name, Date, Amount, and Comment fields. On save, the update must reflect immediately on the Trip History page, the Summary page (SummaryPanel/PaymentSummaryPanel), and any balance calculations.

quotes: amount can be editable or deletable which reflects and can be adjust everywhere where applicable

acceptanceCriteria: Edit dialog pre-fills all four fields (Name, Date, Amount, Comment) from the selected entry
Saving the edit updates the entry in the shared ledger state
Changes appear immediately on Trip History page without refresh
Changes are reflected on the Summary page and in balance calculations for the affected traveller

requirements.text: Implement a Delete confirmation dialog for Other Pending Amount entries accessible from the Trip History page. On confirmation, the entry must be permanently removed from the shared ledger state and the deletion must reflect on the Summary page and balance calculations.

quotes: amount can be editable or deletable which reflects and can be adjust everywhere where applicable

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking Delete on an entry opens a confirmation dialog showing the entry's Name and Amount
Confirming deletion removes the entry from the shared ledger state
The Trip History list updates immediately after deletion
The Summary page and balance calculations update to reflect the removal

constraints: Other Pending Amount data must use a single shared source of truth — edits and deletes from Trip History must reflect on the Summary page and vice versa
Do not break existing OtherPendingAmountForm functionality on the Summary page
Balance calculations in ledgerBalances.ts must continue to include Other Pending Amounts correctly after edits/deletes
nonGoals: Grouping Other Pending Amounts by traveller on the Trip History page (flat list is sufficient)
Adding new Other Pending Amount entries from the Trip History page (only edit/delete required there)
Changes to the Daily Tab or trip participation grid
